ddls:
CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent being trained */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environment in which the agent is trained */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the training session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the training session */,
  "total_episodes" INTEGER /* Total number of training episodes */,
  "cumulative_reward" REAL /* Cumulative reward accumulated during the session */,
  "total_teaching_time" REAL /* Total teaching time spent on the agent */,
  "total_attention_focus" REAL /* Total attention focus measured during the session */,
  "total_episode_length" INTEGER /* Total length of all episodes combined */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teaching strategy used for the session */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the training session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training session (e.g., completed, paused, in-progress) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the session */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the agent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agent and its capabilities */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of agent (e.g., Q-learning, SARSA) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the agent */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters of the agent's algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment and its challenges */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of environment (e.g., grid world, continuous) */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teaching strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the strategy */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy and its effects */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of strategy (e.g., exploration-exploitation, imitation learning) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the session */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the session was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_access_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_episode_metrics" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session this episode belongs to */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number within the session */,
  "reward" REAL /* Reward accumulated during this episode */,
  "teaching_time" REAL /* Teaching time spent during this episode */,
  "attention_focus" REAL /* Attention focus measured during this episode */,
  "episode_length" INTEGER /* Length of this episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_episode_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_session_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when this version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_session_versions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user this permission belongs to */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session this permission is for */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, modify, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session this report is for */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., metrics, analysis) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session this annotation is for */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)
